message:
feat(trace,lab): topology-prioritized exploration with H1 persistence scoring

- Add TopologyExplorer with BinaryHeap frontier ordered by TopologicalScore
- Add scoring.rs: TopologicalScore, ClassId, EvidenceLedger, score_persistence()
- Add boundary.rs: SquareComplex with from_edges() and from_trace_poset()
- Add boundary operators ∂₁ (edges→vertices) and ∂₂ (squares→edges)
- Add matmul_gf2() for verifying ∂₁∘∂₂ = 0
- Add ExplorationMode enum (Baseline/TopologyPrioritized)
- All operations deterministic; both exploration modes produce identical
  results given same config and test closure

Closes: bd-3o9r, bd-2mk1, bd-1nea, bd-1yol, bd-29nj, bd-2592,
        bd-3vhm, bd-115y, bd-183n, bd-2bxz, bd-1ony

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
